title: corylus wulingensis
intro: Corylus wulingensis, also known as Wuling hazelnut or Wuling corylus, is a species of hazelnut tree native to China. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Corylus wulingensis include reducing blood pressure, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. The plant is typically prepared as a decoction or infusion for use in traditional medicine, with some herbal preparations also utilizing the nut oil for its moisturizing and anti-aging properties.
